title: Pixel Logic
creator: Michael Azzi
description: A visual guide to pixel clusters, lines, curves, anti-aliasing, color, light, texture, sprites, tiles, and animation. A free preview explains the approach before purchase.
useful: Examples are built around pixel-level decisions rather than treating pixel art as merely low-resolution illustration.
audience: Beginning pixel artists and small teams producing readable 2D game assets.
learning: Build clean forms from intentional pixel clusters
Control color and contrast at small scales
Prepare sprites and tiles for animation
